news_items.headline: ICE Officers Soon Will Help With Airport Security Unless Democrats End Shutdown, Trump Says
news_items.description: In a series of social media posts, Trump said he was making plans to put officers from U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement in airports if the congressional standoff continues.

news_items.headline: TSA airport security by Donald Trump: Waiting time to checking at airports - What will happen on Monday?
news_items.description: Donald Trump TSA Security: Elon Musk, the world’s richest person, on Saturday offered to cover TSA paychecks.

news_items.headline: Cuba Says Its Military Is Prepared as Trump’s Threats Multiply
news_items.description: A senior Cuban official said the country is preparing for a possible military assault as President Donald Trump increases economic pressure on the government in Havana and suggests it could be the next US target after Venezuela and Iran.

news_items.headline: From Iran to Cuba, Trump’s Sanctions Have Hurt People More Than Governments
news_items.description: The US says “sanctions” are about regime change, but in practice they are economic warfare against entire populations.

news_items.headline: ‘Saturday Night Live U.K.’ Premiere Roasts Keir Starmer’s Trump Anxiety in Awkward Cold Open
news_items.description: Even a Gen Z adviser can’t save this transatlantic meltdown.

news_items.headline: Deepfakes and AI Misinformation Reshape How War Is Seen Online
news_items.description: Viral synthetic videos of the war on Iran highlight urgent need for AI literacy.

news_items.headline: Oil crisis: Russian crude tanker docks near Mangaluru port
news_items.description: A Russian oil tanker, MT Aqua Titan, has arrived in India. This comes as global energy supplies face disruption due to the West Asia conflict. Another cargo ship carrying LPG from the United States also reached Mangaluru. Indian ports are waiving charges for …

news_items.headline: Govt may consider OFS option for raising public float in IDBI Bank
news_items.description: The government may consider selling a stake in IDBI Bank through the Offer-for-Sale (OFS) route to increase public shareholding, after the unsuccessful attempt to divest stake in the LIC-controlled lender, sources said.
